SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: EVANS, NEIL C. SUBSTITUTED FOR PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-08-2014 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF APPEARS THIS DAY; NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK S. VAN TREE & M. MANZELLA (DEPT. 506).
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BERNER, NICHOLAS $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,600.00, DEFENDANT DOES NOT APPEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
